summary: This document compiles statistics and facts regarding social isolation among seniors in the UK, Chile, and Mexico, highlighting health risks and healthcare costs. It details the financial burden on the NHS, including specific costs per GP consultation and total annual savings potential. It also lists target insurance providers and includes a brief anecdote about a team member's experience with health apps.
